headline: Trump рҹҚҠрҹ”Ҙ SUES BBC рҹ’Ҙрҹ“ә for $5B J6 EDIT DRAMA рҹҳЎвңӮпёҸ
text:
ORANGE MAN BAD рҹҚҠрҹҳӨ DROPS рҹ’Ј $5BN (ВЈ3.7BN рҹ’°рҹӨ‘) NUKE on BBC рҹҗқрҹ“ә over PANORAMA SNIP вңӮпёҸрҹҚҶ that TWISTED his J6 RALLY SPEECH рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹҸӣпёҸ like a FAKE NEWS ORGY рҹ’ҰрҹӨҘ! Trumpie рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹҚ‘ accuses Auntie Beeb of DEFAMATION рҹҳұрҹҡ« and TRADE LAW VIOLZ рҹ”’, filing in FLORIDA рҹҢҙвҡ–пёҸ cuz they 'MALICIOUSLY DOCTORED' his words вҖ“ turned 'walk down n CHEER рҹ‘Ҹ senators' into 'FIGHT LIKE HELL рҹ”Ҙрҹ‘№' RIGHT BEFORE RIOT VIBES рҹҸ—пёҸрҹ’Ҙ! BBC said SORRY рҹҳ”рҹҷҸ last month but NO BUCKS рҹ’ёрҹҡ«, 'no defam claim bby рҹ‘¶!' Spox: 'We FIGHTIN' рҹҘҠвҡ”пёҸ this!' Trump whined to press: 'They CHEATED рҹҳЎ, changed words from MY MOUTH рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹҚ‘!' 

PANORAMA CLIP вңӮпёҸрҹ“№ spliced 50+ mins of speech into VIOLENT CALL рҹҡЁрҹ”Ә 'impression' вҖ“ leaked INTERNAL MEMO рҹҚөрҹ’Ј roasted the edit, FORCED DG Tim Davie & News Boss Deborah Turness to BOUNCE рҹ’ЁрҹҡӘ RESIGN! BBC lawyers clapped back: 'No MALICE рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷҖпёҸ, Trump WON re-election рҹ—іпёҸрҹҸҶ post-air, no HARM вҖ“ plus NO US DROPS рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹҡ«, iPlayer UK-ONLY рҹ”’рҹҮ¬рҹҮ§!' But Trump lawsuit SPILLS: BBC deals w/ THIRD-PARTY DISTRIB рҹ”Ҙрҹ“ә let it LEAK globally, FLORIDA VPN SIMPS рҹҢҙрҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ streamed via BritBox рҹҚҝрҹӨ« вҖ“ 'VPN SPIKE рҹ“Ҳрҹҳі proves CAPITOL PEEPZ saw it!' 

UK POLIS SIMPIN HARD рҹӨӨ: Health Min Stephen Kinnock рҹ’үрҹ§‘вҖҚвҡ•пёҸ tells Sky 'BBC STAND FIRM рҹӣЎпёҸ, they APOLOGIZED for oopsies but NO LIBEL JUICE рҹҚ№!' Labour BACKS BBC рҹ‘ҸрҹҮ¬рҹҮ§ as 'VITAL INSTITUTION рҹҸӣпёҸрҹ’Һ'. Shadow Culture Nigel Huddleston рҹ“әрҹ•¶пёҸ yells at PM: 'TELL TRUMP рҹҚҠ suin' HURTS LICENSE FEE PAYER WALLET рҹ’ёрҹҳ©!' LibDem Ed Davey рҹӨЎ urges Keir Starmer рҹҘң 'SLAP Trump: UNACCEPTABLE рҹҡ«!' 

TRUMP LAWFARE QUEEN рҹ‘‘вҡ–пёҸ STRIKES AGAIN вҖ“ sued US MEDIA SIMPS рҹӨЎрҹ“ә for BIG BUCKS before, scored MILLION$ SETTLEMENTS рҹ’°рҹҺү! Newsmax Boss Chris Ruddy рҹ“°рҹ—ЈпёҸ (Trump bro рҹ‘¬) admits US defam bar HIGH AF вӣ°пёҸрҹҳ©, but BBC SETTLE or BURN $50-100M рҹ”Ҙрҹ’ё in court COSTS! Ex-BBC Radio Mark Damazer рҹ“»рҹ”Ҙ: 'FIGHT or REPUTATION TOAST рҹҚһрҹ’Ҙ вҖ“ BBC INDEPENDENT AF рҹҮ¬рҹҮ§рҹҶ“, no need Trump WHITE HOUSE FAVORS рҹҳҳрҹҸӣпёҸ!' Wall Street bets рҹ“Ҳ? Auntie Beeb vs MAGA Daddy рҹҚҠрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј вҖ“ popcorn ready рҹҚҝрҹҳҚ, this DEFAM ORGY рҹ’Ұвҡ–пёҸ boutta POP OFF рҹ’ҘвҖјпёҸ
